baselines.headline_insight: all llama.cpp sub-4-bit formats lose ~40% kernel efficiency to decode complexity on sm_61 (54% -> 34-36%); the ~3-bit bracket is winnable by a dp4a-efficient decode at ~3.0-3.4GB resident; beat 22.0 tok/s to win the whole table
